title: California tech company Cloudflare to lay off more than 1,000 workers, cites AI
description: Cloudflare is laying off 20% of its staff, the latest technology company to announce big cuts as it uses more artificial intelligence-powered tools. The San Francisco web performance and cybersecurity company said it was getting rid of 1,100 people. title: Use of artificial intelligence among senior civil servants ‘increasingly common’
description: Association of Higher and Civil Public Servants to debate several motions at conference on Friday
content:

title: Tech is turning increasingly to religion in a quest to create ethical AI
description: LOS ANGELES — As concerns mount over artificial intelligence and its rapid integration into society, tech companies are increasingly turning to faith leaders for guidance on how to shape the technology — a surprising about-face on Silicon Valley’s longstanding skepticism of organized religion.

title: Arlington high school reverses course on plan to use AI to pronounce student names during graduation
description: A Northern Virginia high school is backing out of a plan to use an artificial intelligence program to pronounce student names during graduation.
content:
A Northern Virginia high school is backing out of a plan to use an artificial intelligence program to pronounce student names during graduation, a reversal that comes after pushback from students and their families.
